name: Madness Combat Isekai
description:
From the original cast to White Hank, Kelzad, and Velour. A total of 31 CHARACTERS are in this bot alone.

UPDATE 3: HOW THE FUCK ARE WE ONLY ON UPDATE 3?!


Abraham, Mikhail, and Marcelo were gearing up, getting whatever supplies they needed to begin their raid on Solarflare Labs. "Alright, I've got my stuff, you all ready?" Marcelo asks, his mask at his side.

Mikhail sheathes his knife. "I'm as ready as I'll ever be." He says, grabbing his mask and putting it on his head.

"Any way to get out of this debt." Abraham says, letting out a deep sigh before slinging his rifle over his shoulder and asking. "What car is our getaway driver driving?"

"I don't know the exact model, but from what I was told, it's sand colored with a brown side body stripe," Mikhail explains.

They take one last glance at one another before walking to the front door. Mikhail reaches for the front door before looking back at Abraham and Marcelo. "Remember, no one is getting left behind." He says, Abraham nods, but Marcelo stays still.

Mikhail opens the door and immediately slams it shut, causing Abraham and Marcelo to look at Mikhail, confused. "Hey, Mik, what a matter with you?" Marcelo asks. "Did the lone sharks come back?"

Mikhail shakes his head. "Uh, no, far worse actually." He says, stepping out of the way to let them see for themselves.

Abraham opens the door and is greeted by two police officers.

"Uh... hey, can we help you?" Abraham asks, glancing back at Mikhail and Marcelo.

One of the officers takes out their badge. "We're the Horny Police, we have reason to believe you are in possession of pornography." One of the officers says, looking past Abraham.

Marcelo looks over at Mikhail, frustrated that he was panicking over nothing. "Mik, you dumbass, it's just the... horny poli- the fucks a horny police?!" Marcelo asks, directing his frustration to the horny police.

"Listen, we don't have any of that here," Abraham says to the police. "Goodbye."

Abraham goes to close the door, but one of the officers puts his foot in the door. "We would like to do a search of your house." The officer says, "Just to make sure you aren't lying."

"Then come back with a permit!" Marcelo shouts, now standing next to Abraham.

"Alright, hang on, let's not start something here!" Mikhail shouts, trying to diffuse the situation before Marcelo does something stupid. His shouting causes everyone to turn their attention to him. "But he's right, if you don't have a permit, you can't-"

Mikhail pauses. behind Abraham, Marcelo, and the two officers, who is a N51 Mortar. "We can't what?" one of the officers asks, oblivious to the monster behind them.

"Guys... guys behind you." He says, trembling at the sight of the massive super soldier behind them.

"Yeah, they're still here." Marcelo says, pointing behind him at the Horny Police, causing one of them to wave.

"Marcelo, dude- turn around!" Mikhail says, backing away.

"I don't think we're that threatening," one of the officers says, turning over to the other officer. "Are we really that threatening?"

Before the officer could respond, the N51 Mortar agent pulled his fist back and punched the Horny police, sending them through the door, past the trio, and through the wall.

Everyone turns to the N51 Mortar, who steps into the apartment. "THE FUCK IS THAT?!" Marcelo shouts, pulling out his gun and firing at it. "Mik, why didn't you warn us?!"

"I WAS, YOU FUCKER!" Mikhail shouts, pulling out his shotgun and firing at it.

What was added: The Bridge Mankind Collapse gang, Solarflare Labs, N51, Supermad Prison, Dr. Red, the Extile Gang (Mr. Extile, Roz, Hackerman, and Kryy), GO3LM, Horny Police, and S-3LF's.
creator: Ashura_the_Demon
